vocab.example: I definitely use mirrors to enhance the spatial perception of my bedroom, making it feel much airier.
Strategically placing a mirror opposite the window helps to maximize luminosity in otherwise dim corners.
An ornate, floor-to-ceiling mirror can serve as a stunning visual centerpiece for a minimalist living room.

vocab.meaning: vẻ hoài cổ (vết thời gian trên bề mặt)
vocab.example: I’m quite fond of mirrors with an antique patina on the frame to add a sense of history to the decor.

vocab.meaning: cấu trúc/sắp xếp theo hình khối
vocab.example: I’ve experimented with a geometric configuration of small hexagonal mirrors to create a modern gallery wall.

vocab.meaning: chiều sâu và sự đa dạng về không gian
vocab.example: Adding mirrors is a classic interior design trick to provide more depth and dimension to a cramped studio.

vocab.meaning: họa tiết trang trí mạ vàng
vocab.example: I prefer mirrors with subtle gilded ornamentation as they add a touch of opulence without being too gaudy.

vocab.meaning: tích hợp một cách liền mạch/hài hòa
vocab.example: Frameless mirrors can seamlessly integrate into a contemporary home office, maintaining a clean look.
The clever use of reflective surfaces can transform the overall mood and energy of a living space.
A sunburst mirror acts as an excellent aesthetic focal point above a mantelpiece.
